programmes.show_description: Tense thriller with Tom Berenger. A reclusive Vietnam veteran has his life turned upside down when he finds a dead woman and a bag of money while hunting in the snowy outback of Northern Maine.

When a young woman is accused of stealing money from her mother's ex-boyfriend, she throws out wild allegations against him.

When Margaret McOnie is found dead on the cliff tops, a nationwide manhunt followed. Her murderer would soon be revealed as a deadly conman and a double murderer.
In 2014, 18-year-old UK college student Jamil Palmer was found fatally stabbed in Crane Park, Hounslow. He had suffered three stab wounds, one of which pierced his heart.

Thriller with Denzel Washington. A CIA agent sent to question a rogue operative arrested for betraying the agency has to protect the prisoner from mercenaries - and resist his mind games.
Action adventure with Dwayne Johnson. After a decade in prison, a criminal sets out to avenge the murder of his brother - while being pursued by a cop and a ruthless hitman.

programmes.show_description: Crime drama sequel with Ian Ogilvy. After a daring heist puts them away in Britain's toughest prison, an aging criminal outfit encounters a nemesis intent on settling an old score.
